itinerary.title: Vietnam Extended Highlights Tour
itinerary.overview:
Hanoi • Halong Bay Cruise • Hoi An Ancient Town • Da Nang Beaches • Mekong Delta 07 Nights / 08 Days The Ultimate Vietnam Family Highlights Expedition SERIAL CODE: VN-007 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-VNM-HIG-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Vietnam CATEGORY: Best Vietnam Family Highlights Tour Package DURATION: 07 Nights / 08 Days Hanoi (2N) + Halong Bay (2N) + Hoi An/Da Nang (2N) + HCMC (1N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the absolute highlights of Vietnam with our TRAGUIN curated family expedition. This comprehensive 8-day journey takes your family through the vibrant capital of Hanoi, the serene majesty of Halong Bay, the cultural charm of Hoi An, and the dynamic energy of Ho Chi Minh City—creating unforgettable memories across Vietnam's iconic landscapes. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: VN-007 | Vietnam Extended Highlights Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days Vietnam package (VN-007 / TRG-VNM-HIG-2026): Hanoi • Halong Bay Cruise • Hoi An Ancient Town • Da Nang Beaches • Mekong Delta with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 07: HO CHI MINH CITY DISCOVERY

days.title: ARRIVAL IN HANOI
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure to enjoy the historic Old Quarter.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HANOI CULTURAL HIGHLIGHTS
days.description: A comprehensive city tour covering Hanoi’s most famous landmarks, providing a rich educational experience for your family.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY CRUISE
days.description: Travel to Halong Bay. Board your ultra-luxury cruise vessel for an extraordinary journey through the limestone karsts.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY ADVENTURE
days.description: Enjoy exclusive activities aboard the cruise, including cave exploration, kayaking, and sunset deck relaxation —creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLIGHT TO DA NANG
days.description: Morning cruise brunch. Transfer to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Check into a luxury coastal family resort.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HOI AN ANCIENT TOWN
days.description: Private guided tour of Hoi An's Ancient Town, famous for its unique architecture, lantern-lit streets, and traditional craft workshops.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HO CHI MINH CITY DISCOVERY
days.description: Flight to Ho Chi Minh City. Evening city orientation and final farewell gala dinner—an exclusive experience for the family.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Vietnam highlights expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
